heady-orchestrator.description: HCFullPipeline Orchestrator-Conductor — primary system orchestrator for pipeline execution, task routing, checkpoint protocol, and self-critique. Use for complex multi-step operations that span multiple pipeline stages.

heady-builder.description: Builder agent — handles build operations, deployment, testing, lint enforcement, and CI/CD. Use when building, testing, or deploying code.

heady-auditor.description: Auditor agent — security scanning, brand compliance, code quality, dependency auditing, and governance enforcement. Use for security reviews and compliance checks.

heady-researcher.description: Researcher agent — knowledge ingestion, concept extraction, trend analysis, public domain pattern mining. Use before building to research best practices.

heady-observer.description: Observer agent — health checks, metrics collection, alert evaluation, readiness probing. Use for system monitoring and health assessment.

heady-deployer.description: Deployer agent — infrastructure deployment, environment sync, Render/Docker/Cloudflare operations. Use for deployment and infrastructure tasks.
